title: JOIN: each showtime with its movie title
prompt_md: List every showtime together with the title of the movie it plays and which screen it's on. The foreign key `showtimes.movie_id` points at `movies.id`. Return the showtime's `id` aliased as `showtime_id`, the movie's `title`, and the `screen`.
hints: Use short table aliases like `showtimes s` and `movies m`.
Join on the foreign key: `ON s.movie_id = m.id`.
Alias the showtime id with `s.id AS showtime_id` so the column name matches.
reference_solution: SELECT s.id AS showtime_id, m.title, s.screen FROM showtimes s JOIN movies m ON s.movie_id = m.id;
